name: Alex Pereira
oneLiner: The fast-climb knockout case: middleweight gold, light heavyweight gold, huge title moments, and a heavyweight swing that added risk to a short UFC prime.
compareShortCase: Pereira is the fast-climb, two-division knockout case: middleweight gold, light heavyweight gold, huge title moments, and one of the loudest short UFC primes ever.
compareCounter: The argument against Pereira is volume. The peak is huge, but the UFC sample is still shorter than the deepest all-time cases.
